📋 Legend

🔴 CRITICAL (≥40)
🟠 HIGH (≥25)
🟡 MEDIUM (≥15)
🟢 LOW (<15)

Edge Colors:
─ Black: Data/Driver
─ Blue: Clock
─ Red: Reset

Cover Status:
✓ = SVA covered
🟡 = Coverage covered
✓🟡 = Both
🚨 = Gap (high risk, no cover)
